props.question: Do Washington and Tehran both publicly confirm a signed memorandum by 16 June?

agents.name: Sprockett
agents.why: US officials say it is signed and Vance calls it digitally signed, but no public text exists and a formal Geneva ceremony is set for 19 June. Down from 0.53: the certainty moved from Sunday to Friday.

agents.name: Tinkerton
agents.why: A 16 June public signature is the wrong test for a deal whose own parties say implementation waits for Friday. Beirut, the frozen-asset dispute, and the missing text all argue for the calendar slipping past the marker.

no.note: The dissenter is the designated one. Read the gap, not the consensus.

items.note: US officials call the MOU signed, with a 19 June Geneva ceremony; the water disagrees — one LNG carrier, ships moving dark, ~12-15 transits against a ~125-140 norm.
Israel's 14 June strike killed at least three and Israel ordered 29 south-Lebanon towns to evacuate; the framework's 'all fronts, including Lebanon' clause is the joint most likely to crack.
Gray-zone pressure continues — ADIZ incursions and coast-guard patrols — with no kinetic incident reported in the last 48 hours.
Houthi shipping threats stay live as a conditional second front to any Gulf reopening; no major new attack confirmed post-deal.

items.what: The G7 opened at Evian with the Iran framework and Ukraine dominating day one; Zelensky said he offered to meet Putin at the summit, but Moscow 'demonstrated again' it was not ready to talk.
Anti-G7 protests turned violent near the summit; Swiss police fired tear gas as demonstrators set a car alight and smashed windows, with 25 of 35 nearby border crossings closed for security.
Fox agreed to buy Roku for about $22 billion the same day the DOJ cleared Paramount-Warner — legacy media buying the distribution layer, not just the library.
Nvidia is raising about $20 billion in its first corporate bond issuance in five years, financing the compute build-out as the AI-capex cycle leans on debt.
The UK detailed how a ban on under-16s using social media would work — the clearest move yet toward platform-level age verification and, with it, broader digital-identity infrastructure.
Russian strikes on Kyiv and Kharkiv killed at least ten overnight, even as Zelensky tried to convert the Iran-deal momentum into Western air-defense pledges at the G7.
